title: TileLayerSelector
description: A layer selector inside a TileMapBandDefinition: either a stable layer **id** (`number`) or a **unique** layer **name** (`string`). Selectors resolve across the map's tile **and** image layers. Names that are shared by more than one layer (of either kind) are rejected as ambiguous — reference such layers by id. An id shared by a tile layer and an image layer (possible only in fallback-ordered maps, which never validated cross-kind uniqueness) is equally ambiguous — reference such layers by a unique name.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: A layer selector inside a TileMapBandDefinition: either a stable layer **id** (`number`) or a **unique** layer **name** (`string`). An id shared by a tile layer and an image layer (possible only in fallback-ordered maps, which never validated cross-kind uniqueness) is equally ambiguous — reference such layers by a unique name.
